falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would contradict the pattern's implied bearish structure, invalidating the HOLD signal.
A blowoff score above 60 indicates extreme overbought conditions, directly contradicting the pattern's implied consolidation phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 200% above the 30-day average on a single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a volume spike would indicate a confirmed breakout or blowoff, falsifying the current indecisive HOLD verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
